hooks.command: cd /home/xiuerhuahuazi/projects/tmp/sina-hq-crawler && if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then uv run ruff check --fix --quiet "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi

cd /home/xiuerhuahuazi/projects/tmp/sina-hq-crawler && FILE=$(basename "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" .py) && TEST_FILE="tests/test_${FILE}.py" && if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then uv run pytest "$TEST_FILE" -q --tb=short --no-header 2>&1 | tail -8; fi
